sentence: 超市里的消费品种类很丰富。
pinyin: Chāoshì lǐ de xiāofèipǐn zhǒnglèi hěn fēngfù.
english: The supermarket has a great variety of consumer goods.

sentence: 他在大学选修了现象学课程。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué xuǎnxiū le xiànxiàngxué kèchéng.
english: He took a phenomenology course as an elective at university.

sentence: 沙漠里的骆驼能好几天不喝水。
pinyin: Shāmò lǐ de luòtuo néng hǎo jǐ tiān bù hē shuǐ.
english: Camels in the desert can go several days without drinking water.

sentence: 他们搬到了内陆城市生活。
pinyin: Tāmen bān dào le nèilù chéngshì shēnghuó.
english: They moved to an inland city to live.

sentence: 定期检查乳房对女性健康很重要。
pinyin: Dìngqī jiǎnchá rǔfáng duì nǚxìng jiànkāng hěn zhòngyào.
english: Regular breast examinations are very important for women's health.
